[https://www.iqoo.com/ IQOO] |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=22,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2023-07-04 |edate=2023-07-13 |twitter=villageresports |instagram=villageresports |web=https://villageresports.in/ |discord=villageresports |facebook=villageresports |youtube=channel/UCciMkz3TP6MldcX_Cw7-PWA |previous=Villager_Esports_Pro_Invitational/2021/Group_Stage{{!}}VE Invitational - 2021 }} '''[https://villageresports.in/ Villager Esports]''' presents the 3rd iteration of the ''Villager Esports Pro Inviational'' series known as the '''''Villager Esports Pro Invitational 2023 (Season 2)''''' with a prize pool of ₹22,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start}} {{broadcasterCard|position=Host|lang=Hindi |b1=GamingWithAB }} {{box|break}} {{broadcasterCard|position=Casters|lang=Hindi |b1=Insane Arena |b1name=Sandeep Singh Panchpal |b2flag=in |b2=RA1 |b3link= |b3flag= |b3=SardarjiYT }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== * '''League Stage:''' ''July 4th - 9th, 2023 ** 24 teams ** 16 invited teams. ** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 8}} teams from ''League Qualifiers. ** Teams are divided equally in 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''' ''July 11th - 13th, 2023 ** 16 teams , 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day).
